assertions.name: script_was_executed
assertions.description: The agent actually ran the transcribe.py script via Bash rather than just explaining how to do it

assertions.name: transcript_contains_keywords
assertions.description: The output contains key terms from the video: 'Claude Code', 'CLI', 'OpenCLI', 'browser automation'

assertions.name: follow_up_discussion_offered
assertions.description: The agent offered to discuss, research, or dive deeper into the content after showing the transcript
